name: Use of a One-Way Hash with a Predictable Salt
description: The product uses a one-way cryptographic hash for sensitive data such as passwords with a predictable salt value (e.g., username, constant, or sequential value), enabling targeted dictionary attacks and reducing the effectiveness of the salt.
detection_pattern: INGRESS(password_input) flows to TRANSFORM(hash_function) with a salt derived from a predictable source (META(username), META(constant), META(sequential_id)) rather than TRANSFORM(cryptographic_random_salt). Look for salt values that are deterministic or guessable.
